{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204485520E0EA13BC8EF7F4C8E4"}"},"total":7447},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7296669052880503593","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢 第一次看末世的小说 作者写的很精彩 也很搞笑 剧情很吸应人 女人多这点我最喜欢哈哈哈哈 人物性格描写各有千秋[偷笑] 不说了 继续追喽"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698889790,"group_id":"7144933328859171848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢小说 很崇拜会写小说的作者  喜欢现充的时光 更喜欢动漫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Gyysu9EfMKu4Efnc4+Yqo77TzHi4BgIsj9/HNia2PO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8eb1c1e61cea452e9373268e58517503~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709646&x-signature=qLgHmxwFPGpwK9DsuWghAzt1RM8%3D","user_id":"4259942526898829","user_name":"鲜葱二次元"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4259942526898829","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7144933328859171848","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：【丧尸+天灾+异能+神宠+美女+空间+杀伐果断+建造势力】
末世降临，超级寒流来袭，全球进入冰封世界。
寒流过后，随之而来的就是丧尸病毒爆发。
之后，超级海啸肆虐，全球被淹没于海水当中，成了水上世界。
不久，全球气温又迅速飙升，海水蒸发，直到成为一个干涸的星球。
你以为这就完了？
不，已经被虐了千百遍的人类，即将迎来灭顶之灾——外来物种的入侵。
最悲哀的是，所有人类从开始就只有一年的时间能量，能量耗尽，就会死亡。
要想活下去，在躲避灾难的同时，还要不停地获取时间能量和物资以延续生命。
意外重生的萧扬，回到了末世来临的前10天，前世的空间异能也随之而来。
于是，他开始疯狂的囤积物资，打造最豪华临时庇护所，定制末世版重卡越野房车和豪华大型游艇。
……

.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310135&x-signature=4WROWjG8VpetcoPZ%2Bv%2F8732WBw8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"106639450989","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.89604415e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204485520E0EA13BC8EF7F4C8E4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读56小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13547,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":203151,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5135},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7291317067399299896","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的超精彩，作者很会吊我胃口，每次的章节开头才写上一章的结果，我真是越看越爱看，男主刻画的超棒，给我看的犯花痴了。作者逻辑也很好，有着先天灾后丧尸，最后外星入侵，丧尸超爱的，林诗诗大爱，家人们谁懂啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697643108,"group_id":"7144933328859171848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0QNc1VOGBMcUiSXL3TVImg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d280335548d044c1bec4b0e1c2769c73~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702591&x-signature=Tf0GzutuZm2Fazw500qkdk2DFRc%3D","user_id":"110267630235","user_name":".迷上书甜."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110267630235","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7144933328859171848","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：【丧尸+天灾+异能+神宠+美女+空间+杀伐果断+建造势力】

.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310135&x-signature=4WROWjG8VpetcoPZ%2Bv%2F8732WBw8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"106639450989","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.39123224e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204485520E0EA13BC8EF7F4C8E4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读73小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":125396,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":264519,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11939},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7391787127183131416","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行吧，虽然整体下来剧情都很老套，没有新花样，但好在人物塑造的不错，至少主角团这几十人塑造的都很好，尤其对女性心理塑造的多样性堪称一绝，能把每个女性角色的性格特点都塑造的各不相同，很难得了，节奏整体不快不慢刚刚好，但是当初追这本书的人肯定很折磨，觉得很慢，完结状态下一口气看下来舒服很多，有很多所谓废话实际上对人物塑造都是很关键的，其他大大小小的问题，比如收尾太快，异能设定悖论，龙套刻板角色性格设计，在流畅度上已经不值一提了，至少读起来是舒服的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721036767,"group_id":"7144933328859171848","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1RclCCbt80wJAMi75iMSdl3ZHTAG65yM28rfqXIuTaE","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2107123625638147","user_name":"Yuuri~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2107123625638147","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/n
